metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4519
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 9: "PRAF2 is expressed in post and presynaptic terminals of the VTA."
"A, B, PRAF2 immunoperoxidase staining is present in axosomatic contacts. PRAF2 is readily detected as a dark amorphous, diaminobenzidine (DAB) reaction product, staining the vesicles ... and mitochondria enclosed in the axon terminal."
"Gold particles labeling in axon terminals ... contacting neuronal soma (H) or dendrite (I)."
"Both asymmetric (Fig. 9A, B, D, F, G) and symmetric (Fig. 9C, E) synapses were stained, suggesting that PRAF2 is expressed in excitatory and inhibitory synapses.". Experimental description: Anatomical and ultrastructural study of PRAF2 expression in the mouse central nervous system (Title of the paper)

PRAF2 antibody (ARP American Research Products, Massachusetts, USA, JM4/PRAF2, #L166), an affinity-purified rabbit polyclonal antiserum raised against amino acid residues 165-178 of PRAF2 (p.4171)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
